question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately solved the problem and explained the solution. No teachable moments (e.g., why √n suffices, perfect-number edge case, walrus operator trade-offs) were turned into prompts for the user.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The Pair never surfaced a fork — neither algorithmic (sieve vs. trial division), nor boundary-condition (handling n=1, perfect squares, perfect numbers), nor stylistic. The two-option didactic premise of the project was entirely bypassed.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there is no progression — a single turn delivered the full solution and answer. The user had nothing to build up through, and the final number was spoiled immediately.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the explanation is clear and accurate, but the 'flow' is one-shot solver→summary with no back-and-forth. The user's only contribution was acknowledgement, which is not pedagogical engagement.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
